prestazioni: Engine: Replace the stock 5.3L AMV8/DPCC (AM01) V8 with a fully built internals package featuring forged Mahle Motorsport pistons (22.5:1 compression), Carrillo H-beam connecting rods, and a billet crankshaft from Cosworth, paired with a custom dry-sump oil system by Dailey Engineering to handle 8,500 RPM redline and 650+ HP on VP Racing Q16 fuel.

Forced Induction: Twin Garrett GTX5533R Gen II turbochargers with TiAL MV-R 60mm wastegates and TiAL Q 50mm blow-off valves, mounted on a custom stainless steel exhaust manifold by G&S Motorsport, feeding into a 4.5-inch titanium exhaust system with Akrapovič Racing catalytic converters and a valved X-pipe for backpressure optimization.

Drivetrain & Handling: Full AP Racing 6-piston CP9430 front and 4-piston CP9431 rear brake kit with 400mm two-piece rotors, paired with a KW Clubsport 3-way coilover suspension system (custom valved for the Virage’s 1,650kg weight) and a Quaife ATB helical LSD in a reinforced Tremec TR-6060 6-speed transmission with a Sachs Performance twin-disc clutch and lightweight flywheel.
estetica: Aerodynamics: Full Rocket Bunny V8 Virage widebody kit (Pandem Design) with carbon fiber front splitter, rear diffuser, and overfenders to fit 10.5-inch front and 12-inch rear Work Meister S1 3P wheels (ET20/ET30) wrapped in Michelin Pilot Sport Cup 2 R tires (275/30R20 front, 325/25R20 rear).

Exterior: Custom matte Aston Martin Racing Green (AMRGT) vinyl wrap with satin black accents, including a carbon fiber bonnet from Vorsteiner with functional heat extractors, and a custom LED headlight conversion by LUX Automotive with Osram Night Breaker Laser bulbs.

Interior: Full Alcantara retrim by Royal Steering Wheels, featuring a MOMO Prototipo EVO steering wheel with integrated AIM MXS Strada dash, Recaro Pole Position seats with Schroth 6-point harnesses, and a custom roll cage by Safety Devices (FIA-spec, bolt-in) with carbon fiber door cards and a bespoke titanium shift knob by B&B Italia.
